name: the single-config options container accepts arbitrary tool-native option keys (additionalProperties true)
command: node -e 'const s=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8"));function f(o,k){if(o&&typeof o=="object"){if(o.properties&&o.properties.options)return o.properties.options;for(const v of Object.values(o)){const r=f(v,k);if(r)return r}}return null}const opt=f(s);process.exit(opt&&opt.additionalProperties===true?0:1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/rubric-rule.schema.json" && echo universal-container 1>&2
